loadErrorNoAccount: Unable to load your account. Please sign in again.
pwMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
pwNote: Other signed-in devices will be signed out after the change.
pwUpdated: Password updated. Other devices must sign in again.
alertsHint: Configure the alert webhook on the Alerts page to get notified when a site goes down.

report.title: Business reports
report.desc: Periodically summarize per-site revenue/cost/margin and email a digest, with alerts on cost anomalies. Requires SMTP configured on the server to actually send.
report.recipientsHint: Separate multiple emails with commas; leave empty to fall back to the alert email.
report.recipientsInvalid: Recipients contain an invalid email address
report.marginLowHint: Sites below this gross margin trigger a warning.
report.marginLowInvalid: Margin threshold must be between 0 and 100
report.costSpikeHint: Warn when current cost exceeds the previous period by this factor.
report.costSpikeInvalid: Cost spike factor must be at least 1
report.noResolveNote: Margin/cost warnings need manual handling on the Alerts page; they do not auto-resolve.
report.sendTestHint: Immediately render a daily report from the current settings and email it to the recipients, so you can verify delivery without waiting for the scheduled run.
report.testPartial: Test report partially delivered: {sent} of {total} recipient(s); check SMTP output
report.testFailed: Failed to send the test report; please check SMTP output and recipient settings
